testcase.name: isPassedLetterTests
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Incorrect return value of isPassed Expected: is ⟨false⟩ but: was ⟨true⟩ (<== see Console output for more context) at dev.m3s.programming2.homework2.StudentCourseTests.isPassedLetterTests(StudentCourseTests.java:255)
testcase.system-out: Calling new Course( "uhbtiykthk", 95186, 'A', 0, 2, 20.0, true ) Calling new StudentCourse( [95186A (20.00 cr), "uhbtiykthk". Optional, period: 2.], 1, 2017 ) Calling new Course( "miytokgrrl", 635609, 'P', 1, 4, 49.0, false ) Calling new StudentCourse( [635609P (49.00 cr), "miytokgrrl". Mandatory, period: 4.], 70, 2025 ) Calling setGrade( 'F' ) Calling isPassed( ) ✓ Calling setGrade( 'A' ) Calling isPassed( ) ✓ Calling setGrade( 'f' ) Calling isPassed( )

testcase.name: courseTests
testcase.system-out:
Calling new Course( "ashrysnjgp", 599399, 'S', 0, 4, 5.0, false ) Calling new StudentCourse( [599399S ( 5.00 cr), "ashrysnjgp". Optional, period: 4.], 70, 2006 ) Calling new Course( "oqxucqzwgu", 427002, 'P', 0, 4, 8.0, true ) Calling setCourse( [427002P ( 8.00 cr), "oqxucqzwgu". Optional, period: 4.] ) Calling getCourse( ) Checking whether the two course objects are equal: => Course 2: Reading the value of private String name ~> "oqxucqzwgu" => Course 1: Checking whether private String name is "oqxucqzwgu" ~> "oqxucqzwgu" (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private String courseCode ~> "427002P" => Course 1: Checking whether the value of private String courseCode matches "427002P" ~> "427002P" (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private Character courseBase ~> 'P' => Course 1: Checking whether private Character courseBase is 'P' ~> 'P' (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private int period ~> 4 => Course 1: Checking whether private int period is 4 ~> 4 (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private double credits ~> 8.0 => Course 1: Checking whether private double credits is 8.0 ~> 8.0 (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private boolean numericGrade ~> true => Course 1: Checking whether private boolean numericGrade is true ~> true (true) ✓ => The course objects are equal.
Reading the value of private Course course ~> [427002P ( 8.00 cr), "oqxucqzwgu". Optional, period: 4.] Checking whether the two course objects are equal: => Course 2: Reading the value of private String name ~> "oqxucqzwgu" => Course 1: Checking whether private String name is "oqxucqzwgu" ~> "oqxucqzwgu" (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private String courseCode ~> "427002P" => Course 1: Checking whether the value of private String courseCode matches "427002P" ~> "427002P" (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private Character courseBase ~> 'P' => Course 1: Checking whether private Character courseBase is 'P' ~> 'P' (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private int period ~> 4 => Course 1: Checking whether private int period is 4 ~> 4 (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private double credits ~> 8.0 => Course 1: Checking whether private double credits is 8.0 ~> 8.0 (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private boolean numericGrade ~> true => Course 1: Checking whether private boolean numericGrade is true ~> true (true) ✓ => The course objects are equal.

testcase.name: gradeNumLetterTests
testcase.system-out: Calling new Course( "zlybjxuiow", 536854, 'S', 1, 3, 1.0, false ) Calling new StudentCourse( [536854S ( 1.00 cr), "zlybjxuiow". Mandatory, period: 3.], 65, 2005 ) Calling new Course( "ilpcdluvlj", 954819, 'S', 0, 3, 9.0, false ) Calling new StudentCourse( [954819S ( 9.00 cr), "ilpcdluvlj". Optional, period: 3.], 0, 0 ) Calling setGrade( 70 ) Checking whether private int gradeNum is 70 ~> 70 (true) Reading the value of private int gradeNum ~> 70 ✓ Reading the value of private int yearCompleted ~> 2026 ✓ Assigning value 65 to private int gradeNum Checking whether getGradeNum( ) returns 65 ~> 65 (true) Calling getGradeNum( ) ✓ Calling setGrade( 0 ) Checking whether getGradeNum( ) returns 0 ~> 65 (false) ✓ Calling setGrade( 1 ) Checking whether getGradeNum( ) returns 1 ~> 65 (false) ✓ Calling setGrade( 2 ) Checking whether getGradeNum( ) returns 2 ~> 65 (false) ✓ Calling setGrade( 3 ) Checking whether getGradeNum( ) returns 3 ~> 65 (false) ✓ Calling setGrade( 4 ) Checking whether getGradeNum( ) returns 4 ~> 65 (false) ✓ Calling setGrade( 5 ) Checking whether getGradeNum( ) returns 5 ~> 65 (false) ✓ Checking whether private int gradeNum is 65 ~> 65 (true) Reading the value of private int gradeNum ~> 65 ✓

testcase.name: checkGradeValidityTests

testcase.name: yearCompletedTests
testcase.system-out: Calling new Course( "csffzqzfxr", 714785, 'S', 1, 3, 5.0, false ) Calling new StudentCourse( [714785S ( 5.00 cr), "csffzqzfxr". Mandatory, period: 3.], 70, 2024 ) Calling new Course( "nihsqyxtmb", 464218, 'A', 0, 2, 54.0, false ) Creating new StudentCourse( [464218A (54.00 cr), "nihsqyxtmb". Optional, period: 2.], 113, 38 ) (letter graded) Calling new StudentCourse( [464218A (54.00 cr), "nihsqyxtmb". Optional, period: 2.], 38, 113 ) Calling setGrade( 'A' ) Checking whether private int yearCompleted is 2026 ~> 2026 (true) Reading the value of private int yearCompleted ~> 2026 ✓ Checking whether getYear( ) returns 2026 ~> 2026 (true) Calling getYear( ) ✓ Calling setYear( 2001 ) Checking whether private int yearCompleted is 2001 ~> 2001 (true) Calling setYear( 2026 ) Checking whether private int yearCompleted is 2026 ~> 2026 (true) Calling setYear( 2000 ) Checking whether private int yearCompleted is within ]2000, 2026] ~> 2026 (true) Calling setYear( 2027 ) Checking whether private int yearCompleted is within ]2000, 2026] ~> 2026 (true) Calling setYear( 2007 ) Checking whether getYear( ) returns 2007 ~> 2007 (true) Reading the value of private int yearCompleted ~> 2007 ✓ Calling setYear( -1 ) Checking whether private int yearCompleted is 2007 ~> 2007 (true) Reading the value of private int yearCompleted ~> 2007 ✓

testcase.name: toStringTests
testcase.system-out: Calling new Course( "uqejrhsquh", 512768, 'A', 0, 1, 21.0, true ) Calling new StudentCourse( [512768A (21.00 cr), "uqejrhsquh". Optional, period: 1.], 3, 2006 ) Calling new Course( "vaagugumvw", 258651, 'P', 1, 1, 18.0, true ) Calling new StudentCourse( [258651P (18.00 cr), "vaagugumvw". testcase.name: gradeNumNumericTests
testcase.system-out: Calling new Course( "cmvgyqpfit", 841117, 'P', 0, 3, 6.0, false ) Calling new StudentCourse( [841117P ( 6.00 cr), "cmvgyqpfit". Optional, period: 3.], 65, 2012 ) Calling new Course( "rtbbclhlyd", 896685, 'A', 1, 3, 1.0, true ) Calling new StudentCourse( [896685A ( 1.00 cr), "rtbbclhlyd". Mandatory, period: 3.], -1, -1 ) Calling setGrade( 0 ) Checking whether private int gradeNum is 0 ~> 0 (true) Calling setGrade( 5 ) Checking whether private int gradeNum is 5 ~> 5 (true) Calling setGrade( -1 ) Checking whether private int gradeNum is within [0, 5] ~> 5 (true) Calling setGrade( 6 ) Checking whether private int gradeNum is within [0, 5] ~> 5 (true) Reading the value of private int gradeNum ~> 5 ✓ Reading the value of private int yearCompleted ~> 2026 ✓ Assigning value 1 to private int gradeNum Calling getGradeNum( ) ✓ Calling setGrade( 3 ) Checking whether getGradeNum( ) returns 3 ~> 3 (true) ✓ Calling setGrade( 65 ) Checking whether getGradeNum( ) returns 65 ~> 3 (false) ✓ Calling setGrade( 70 ) Checking whether getGradeNum( ) returns 70 ~> 3 (false) ✓ Reading the value of private int gradeNum ~> 3 ✓
